chunks.title: Death of Saul and his sons
chunks.reason: Describes the battle at Gilboa where Saul and his three sons fall in combat.

chunks.title: Recovery of Saul's body
chunks.reason: Narrates the Philistines stripping the bodies and the men of Jabesh-gilead retrieving them for burial.

chunks.title: Reason for Saul's death
chunks.reason: Provides theological explanation for the kingdom passing to David due to Saul's unfaithfulness.
